title: COVID-19 Treatment - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > COVID-19 Treatment 6 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH HOOD RIVER CLINIC MEDICAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adult medical care including yearly exams for all adults, and immunizations such as COVID-19, and flu vaccines. Other services provided include behavioral health evaluations, routine health exams, colorectal and prostate cancer detection, newborn/infant screenings, pediatric care, and extensive sports physicals. Additionally, provides care customized to the unique needs of older adults, including Medicare annual wellness visits. 849 Pacific Avenue Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm, Saturday 8am-3pm Email (541) 386-6380 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH STEVENSON CLINIC MEDICAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adult medical care including yearly exams for all adults, and immunizations such as COVID-19, and flu vaccines. Closed major holidays. Additionally, provides care customized to the unique needs of older adults, including Medicare annual wellness visits. 65371 Highway 14 White Salmon, WA 98672 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm, Saturday 11am-6pm On-call provider and nurse: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (509) 493-2133 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES COVID-19 THERAPEUTICS LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Displays public locations that have received shipments of US government-procured COVID-19 therapeutics under US Food and Drug Administration (FDA) Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) authority. The oral antiviral therapies Lagevrio (molnupiravir), Paxlovid, and Renal Paxlovid are products authorized by the FDA to treat mild to moderate COVID-19. The map also shows outpatient Veklury (remdesivir) provider sites that have opted to appear on the locator tool. Please note outpatient Veklury (remdesivir) is commercially available and not currently distributed by the US Government. 200 Independence Avenue SW Washington, DC 20201 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (800) 232-0233 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH MEDICAL SERVICES ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH MEDICAL SERVICES ONE COMMUNITY HEALTH EXPRESS CLINIC
